description: Configuration keywords for common FLAC plot item types created via 'plot item create <type>'. These keywords control visibility, coloring, clipping, labels, transparency, and legends.

items.name: zone
items.description: Zone visualization with coloring by stress, displacement, pore pressure, temperature, model state, group, or extra variables.
items.common_use: Visualize continuum grid results and material model state.

items.name: gridpoint
items.description: Gridpoint visualization with coloring by displacement, velocity, force, pore pressure, temperature, group, or extra variables.
items.common_use: Inspect nodal values, boundary-condition response, and convergence-related quantities.

items.name: structure
items.description: Structural-element visualization for beams, cables, shells, liners, piles, geogrids, nodes, and related element results.
items.common_use: Visualize structural element groups, forces, moments, systems, and result components.

shared_keywords.description: Keywords common to most FLAC plot item types.

notes: Plot-item keywords are appended after the item type.
Some complex settings are easier to apply with 'plot item modify' after creating the item.
The entries here are practical MCP lookup aids derived from bundled FLAC command/reference resources; verify unusual plot syntax in the target FLAC GUI.
